c.d: The degree to which the app provides accurate and up-to-date price comparisons across multiple retailers.
The number and variety of retailers and product categories the app searches for deals.
How often the app updates and notifies users of new deals and price drops.
The ease of navigation, clarity of information, and overall user-friendliness of the app.
The ability for users to set price alerts, customize deal preferences, and save favorite stores.
